text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development, surrounded by glass walls, bold signage, and displays that merge the digital with the tactile. There is a sense of curiosity and quiet energy, as if new ideas are constantly being generated here. The environment feels modern and open, inviting me to ponder my own relationship with technology and progress. I feel a combination of excitement and contemplation, as this is a place that values innovation as much as reflection.
